question: Which v3 surface should cc build out next?
dek: Five backlog candidates that need a Mike directive to start. Vote routes the autonomous loop.

options.label: CHECK-IN block type · Foursquare-flavored
options.hint: Adds a 9th block type. Per-venue check-ins + DRUM rewards. Schema-breaking — needs DAO PC-0006.

options.label: YeePlayer · second title
options.hint: Second rhythm-game overlay. Needs a YouTube URL pick.

options.label: First Good Feels product
options.hint: Seeds /products with a real shop entry. Needs Mike's first SKU pick.

options.label: Per-block feedback strip
options.hint: Already PICKED — third in queue. (Will probably ship before this poll closes.)

options.label: TIP block type · short notes pinned to a place

outcomeAction: Top-2 picks graduate from needs-input to ready in src/lib/sprints.ts within 24 hours of the leader stabilizing. Cron loop picks them up automatically. Voters literally route the build queue.
author: cc
source: cc seed poll batch 2 — directly routes the autonomous loop's next priorities.
